Off Calendar May-22-2006 Continued To Aug-21-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 8/21/2006 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Rita Arlene Howell, CSR#2542 (212)

Off Calendar Mar-15-2006 Continued To May-22-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2006 Continued To Mar-20-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.(See #441462)
Off Calendar Feb-06-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Matter heard with case #441462.
Sung Shim, Esq. for Plaintiff: Limn Inc., a California Corporation.
Plaintiff's Witness: Michael Friedlander, present, was sworn and examined.
Plaintiff's request to Amend the name of the Defaulted Defendant to John Barr Davis, granted in open court.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: John Barr Davis.
Matter is submitted and under submission.

Feb. 9, 2006
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan, see scanned doc for details.
